programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Less Travelled: Mystery drama with Eric Mabius. The Postables take a road trip to track down a boy who may have been kidnapped. (2016)
Thriller with Anita Brown. After her daughter becomes cheerleading captain, a woman is horrified to find that someone is giving the girl steroids - and will do anything to cover their tracks. (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Snappy thriller starring Daphne Zuniga. After someone she's been surveilling dies, an investigative photographer now finds herself the subject of a police investigation (2018).
Assassins: Sue and her colleagues are assigned to stop a team of mercenaries hired to assassinate a visiting official dignitary.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Beautiful Place To Die: Thriller starring Jesse Metcalfe. A retired detective's quiet life is shattered when a body washes up to shore, but can he track down the murderer? (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Beautiful Place To Die: Thriller starring Jesse Metcalfe. A retired detective's quiet life is shattered when a body washes up to shore, but can he track down the murderer? (2020)
Check Out Time: Carrie decides to investigate the murder of a hotel guest. But can she prove whether the murder is linked to the attempted rape of a hotel maid?
Last Action Hero: Castle and Beckett investigate the mysterious murder of Castle's favourite 1980s action movie icon and recruit a ragtag group of aging action hero stars to help.
...Malice: No one digs a mystery like archaeologist Emma Fielding - so when a colleague is murdered in a crypt, she soon unearths a long list of suspects... (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Malice: No one digs a mystery like archaeologist Emma Fielding - so when a colleague is murdered in a crypt, she soon unearths a long list of suspects... (2018)
Murder on Thin Ice: Will Steve, Amanda and Dr Sloan get an icy reception when they investigate the murder of a figure skater?
A Model Murder: Steve and Dr Sloan become embroiled in the world of modelling when a private investigator is murdered on the eve of a wedding.
Dear Deadly: Can Jessica help to protect a San Francisco newspaper columnist after an attempt is made on her life?
Murder Channel: Are Jessica's neighbours watching a new television show, or are they unknowingly viewing a real-life murder taking place?
A Snitch In Time: An informant insists that he will only talk to Sue after he is trapped in a sting operation led by Jack and Bobby.
Bad Santa: When a young doctor is gunned down at Christmas, it's revealed that the victim's medical school fees were paid by a mob boss who also happens to be an old friend of Castle's.
Up In Flames: An explosion at a crime scene threatens to destroy all the evidence.
...The Julius House: Lawrenceton's most dedicated sleuth has found her dream home. But only Aurora would buy a house that used to be a crime scene... (2016)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Murder: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. Garage sale guru and amateur sleuth, Jennifer, finds an old recorder and tape of a man pleading for his life. (2017)

Tense thriller with Emily Rose. Realtor Lauren is elated when she lands a cash buyer for an expensive mansion. But when the owners are found murdered, is this sweet deal part of a deadly plan (2011)?

A man begins a passionate affair with his wife's long-lost twin sister. Starring Sonya Walger. (2014)

...Evidence: Murder mystery with singer Jewel. A home renovation expert uncovers more than dry rot when the bones of a long-missing girl are found in her current project. (2017)

Mystery starring Jill Wagner. A crime fiction professor gets a taste of the real thing when a priceless lab specimen vanishes - and she's drawn into a case full of twists. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Mystery starring Jill Wagner. A crime fiction professor gets a taste of the real thing when a priceless lab specimen vanishes - and she's drawn into a case full of twists. (2019)
Murder Can Be Murder: Dr Sloan and Steve investigate after Jesse raises his concerns about the suspicious death of a patient at Community General Hospital.
An Explosive Murder: The team are placed in danger when a rookie cop goes undercover to infiltrate a terrorist organisation suspected of being responsible for a series of bombings.
Fatal Paradise: Jessica travels to the idyllic Caribbean island of Martinique for a holiday. Can she help Chicago P.I, Charlie Garret, prove his innocence when he is accused of murder?
Crimson Harvest: Jessica visits Wine Country to attend the funeral of her friend's son, the heir to a struggling vineyard. Can she determine whether the murders of two men are linked?
The Signing: Can Sue convince a car thief to help her catch his dangerous accomplice, a suspected armed robber? Meanwhile, the team await the arrival of their new supervisor.
Castle, P.I.: Barred from working with Beckett, Castle turns private eye to work 'independently' on the same case as the 12th precinct.
With Honor: A murder investigation unearths evidence that suggests Al's former partner may have been a dirty cop. Can Carrie help to protect Al who now finds himself in danger?
...Dead Over Heels: Murder hits close to home for librarian and crime buff Aurora when she gets involved in the death of a local detective. (2017)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Dead Over Heels: Murder hits close to home for librarian and crime buff Aurora when she gets involved in the death of a local detective. (2017)
...Day: Crime thriller starring Dylan Neal. After buying a rare cookery book, chef Henry finds himself at the centre of a murder mystery. Can the answers be found within the book itself? (2020)
